meta.title: Tablix - Transform complex spreadsheets into ready-to-use files
meta.description: Upload your spreadsheet, select the columns you need and generate a new file in seconds. Web tool for custom spreadsheet processing and generation.
meta.privacyDescription: Learn how Tablix collects, uses, and protects your data. Privacy policy compliant with LGPD.
meta.termsDescription: Read the terms and conditions for using the Tablix spreadsheet processing platform.

hero.subtitle: Merge files, keep only what matters, and get a clean output in seconds. No formulas, no rework.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.p1: Tablix Tecnologia ("Tablix", "we") operates the service available at tablix.me. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our service.
intro.p2: By using Tablix, you agree to the practices described in this policy. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

dataCollection.title: Data we collect
dataCollection.description: We collect only the data strictly necessary for the service to function:
dataCollection.fingerprint: Anonymous identifier (fingerprint) — used to control Free plan usage limits. Stored as an httpOnly cookie.
dataCollection.ipHash: IP address hash — used together with the fingerprint for identification. We never store the full IP address.
dataCollection.usageCounters: Usage counters — number of unifications performed in the month, stored in Redis with automatic expiration.
dataCollection.locale: Language preference — stored locally in your browser (localStorage).

spreadsheetProcessing.title: Spreadsheet processing
spreadsheetProcessing.p1: Your files are processed entirely in your browser (client-side) on the Free plan. This means your data is never sent to our servers during processing.
spreadsheetProcessing.p2: On the Pro plan, larger files may be processed on the server. In this case, data is processed in memory and discarded immediately after generating the output file. We do not store, copy, or retain your files.
spreadsheetProcessing.p3: We never access, read, or analyze the contents of your spreadsheets for any purpose other than the processing you requested.

cookies.title: Cookies and local storage
cookies.description: We use the following cookies and local storage data:
cookies.tablixFp: tablix_fp — httpOnly cookie that stores your anonymous identifier. Expires in 1 year.
cookies.theme: theme — Theme preference (light/dark). Stored via localStorage.
cookies.localePref: locale — Language preference. Stored via localStorage.
cookies.noCookies: We do not use tracking, marketing, or advertising cookies.

storage.title: Storage and retention
storage.p1: Usage counters are stored in Redis (Upstash) and expire automatically at the end of each billing period.
storage.p2: The fingerprint cookie expires in 1 year or when you clear your browser data.
storage.p3: We do not maintain a database with personal information. There is no "account" on the Free plan — only the anonymous identifier.

security.title: Security
security.description: We employ the following measures to protect your data:
security.csp: Content Security Policy (CSP) — restricts which resources can be loaded.
security.rateLimit: Rate limiting — protects against abuse and brute force attacks.
security.headers: Security headers — HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, and others.
security.validation: File validation — MIME type, extension, and magic number verification before processing.
security.httpOnly: httpOnly cookies — not accessible via JavaScript, protecting against XSS attacks.

rights.title: Your rights (LGPD)
rights.description: In accordance with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (Law 13,709/2018), you have the right to:
rights.access: Access your data — You can check your usage status directly in the Tablix interface.
rights.deletion: Request deletion — By clearing your browser cookies, the fingerprint is removed. Redis counters expire automatically.
rights.info: Request information — Contact us to learn what data is associated with your identifier.
rights.legalBasis: Legal basis: we use legitimate interest (Art. 7, IX of the LGPD) as the basis for processing data necessary for the service to function.
rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at:

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.description: We use the following third-party services:
thirdParty.vercel: Vercel — Hosting and CDN. Subject to Vercel's privacy policy.
thirdParty.upstash: Upstash Redis — Usage counter storage. Data encrypted in transit and at rest.
thirdParty.analytics: Vercel Analytics — Anonymous performance metrics. Does not collect personally identifiable data.

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Significant changes will be communicated through a notice on the service.
changes.p2: Continued use of Tablix after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: For questions, requests, or complaints related to privacy:

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing and using Tablix ("Service"), available at tablix.me, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use the Service.
acceptance.p2: Tablix is operated by Tablix Tecnologia, based in São Paulo - SP, Brazil.

serviceDescription.title: Service description
serviceDescription.p1: Tablix is a web tool for spreadsheet processing. The service allows you to upload CSV and XLSX files, select specific columns, and generate new files with filtered data.
serviceDescription.p2: Processing on the Free plan is done entirely in your browser. On the Pro plan, larger files may be processed on our servers.

plans.title: Plans and limits
plans.freeDescription: Free, no registration required. Subject to the following limits:
plans.freeLimit3: Up to 3 columns per output file
plans.proDescription: Requires an active subscription. Includes expanded limits:
plans.proLimit3: Up to 10 columns per output file
plans.proLimit5: Maximum 2 MB per file (30 MB total)
plans.limitsNote: Limits may be adjusted at any time. Changes will be communicated in advance.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable use
acceptableUse.description: By using Tablix, you agree not to:
acceptableUse.rule1: Attempt to circumvent your plan's usage limits.
acceptableUse.rule2: Use the service to process illegal or unlawfully obtained data.
acceptableUse.rule3: Reverse engineer, decompile, or attempt to extract the service's source code.
acceptableUse.rule4: Upload malicious files, viruses, or harmful code.
acceptableUse.rule5: Use automation (bots, scrapers) to access the service without prior authorization.

userContent.title: User content
userContent.p1: You are solely responsible for the files you upload to Tablix. The service does not claim ownership of your data.
userContent.p2: On the Free plan, files are processed entirely in your browser and are never sent to our servers.
userContent.p3: On the Pro plan, files are processed in server memory and discarded immediately after processing. We do not store, copy, or retain your files.

ip.title: Intellectual property
ip.p1: Tablix, including its interface, source code, design, and brand, are the exclusive property of Tablix Tecnologia.
ip.p2: You receive a limited, non-exclusive, and revocable license to use the Service in accordance with these Terms.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.p1: Tablix is provided "as-is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
liability.p2: We are not responsible for losses or damages resulting from the use of the service, including but not limited to: data loss, service interruptions, or inaccurate processing results.
liability.p3: The total liability of Tablix Tecnologia, in any case, is limited to the amount paid by the user in the last 12 months.

availability.title: Availability
availability.p1: We strive to keep Tablix available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted availability.
availability.p2: We may perform scheduled or emergency maintenance that may result in temporary unavailability.

suspension.title: Suspension and termination
suspension.p1: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access for any user who violates these Terms of Use.
suspension.p2: We may discontinue the Service or any feature at any time, with reasonable prior notice when possible.

changes.title: Changes to terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms of Use periodically. Significant changes will be communicated through a notice on the service.
changes.p2: Continued use of Tablix after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

governingLaw.title: Governing law
governingLaw.p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil.
governingLaw.p2: The courts of São Paulo - SP are elected to resolve any disputes arising from these Terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.p1: For questions about these Terms of Use:

local.title: Local processing
local.subtitle: Your data never leaves your browser

noStorage.title: No storage
noStorage.subtitle: Files are not kept on our servers

pricingPage.metaDescription: Compare Tablix Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans. Start free, no signup needed.
pricingPage.ctaSubtext: Start in seconds. No signup, no credit card required.

q1.question: Can I try before subscribing?
q1.answer: Yes! The Free plan is free and requires no signup. You can process up to 1 spreadsheet per month with up to 500 rows and 3 columns, no commitment.

q2.question: How does local processing work?
q2.answer: On the Free plan, your spreadsheets are processed directly in your browser. No data leaves your computer — it's 100% local and private.

q3.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q3.answer: Yes. There's no lock-in or cancellation fee. You keep the launch price as long as your subscription is active.

q4.question: Is my data secure?
q4.answer: Your files are processed temporarily and discarded immediately after download. We do not store the content of your spreadsheets.

q5.question: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
q5.answer: The Free plan is ideal for quick tests with smaller limits. Pro offers up to 40 spreadsheets/month, 5,000 rows, 10 columns, server processing, no watermark, and 30-day file history.

q6.question: How does the Enterprise plan work?
q6.answer: Enterprise is for companies with high volume or specific needs. We offer custom limits, guaranteed SLA, dedicated support, and exclusive infrastructure. Contact us for a proposal.

q7.question: What file formats are accepted?
q7.answer: Tablix accepts CSV and XLSX (Excel) files. You can upload up to 3 files at a time on the Free plan and up to 15 on Pro.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies
cookieConsent.message: We use essential cookies for service functionality, such as usage control and preferences. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
